content: Major human rights concerns include ongoing issues of discrimination, systemic racism, gender inequality, lack of freedom of speech in some countries, violations of personal privacy, unequal access to education and healthcare, and the treatment of minority groups and refugees. Specific challenges also involve human trafficking, child labor, torture, arbitrary detention, and limitations on political and civil liberties in various parts of the world.
